title: Bytes, Object Representation, Alignment, Padding, and Endianness
description: A device protocol works on one architecture but leaks padding and faults on a stricter-alignment target. Learners cumulatively produce portable binary representation codec through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inspect object representations through character types while separating value representation, padding, and trap risks.
Compute and satisfy fundamental, extended, member, and allocated alignment requirements before access.
Measure rather than assume member offsets, tail padding, and layout changes across ABI targets.
